title: dactylis glomerata var. maritima
intro: Dactylis glomerata var. maritima, also known as coastal cock's foot, is a variety of the Dactylis glomerata plant that is commonly found in coastal areas with moist soil. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of coastal cock's foot include its ability to reduce swelling and improve respiratory health, making it a natural remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Coastal cock's foot can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and reduce inflammation.
